title: Thoughts and Things 2/9/2024
html:
Yahir is back home at dad's house. Family reunions are framed as rare-and-fragile — everyone performs the "ideal son" role even when not feeling it. He's also debating migrating to cursor as his editor and starting his personal website as a life repository (Sam-Altman-style blogging aspiration).

TL;DR

  • Family-reunion mode: dad showers attention, brother and Yahir play "ideal son" with subtle inauthenticity — recurring family dynamics note.
  • Tooling shift: considering migration to cursor from prior editor — early signal of his AI-coding adoption arc.
  • personal website launched as a life-repository concept — blog inspiration is sam altman.
  • Active OSU server connection issue (remote dev pain) is the friction prompting the cursor move.

dad yahir · yahir family · cursor · personal website · sam altman
